name: Do FAQs and schema really matter for AI visibility?

mainEntity.name: Do FAQs and schema really matter for AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if your pages answer real questions and are supported by clear structure and schema. Direct, conversational headings and FAQ sections help AI systems match your content to natural-language prompts.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. FAQs and schema help AI systems understand and reuse your content more accurately.

description: Yes. FAQs and schema help AI systems understand and reuse your content more accurately.
